name: Amazon
about: Amazon's interview process strongly indexes on their 16 Leadership Principles and technical problem-solving ability.

roles.description: Core software engineering role focusing on scalable systems, coding, and Amazon's Leadership Principles.

rounds.name: Online Assessment (Coding + Work Style)
rounds.instructions: Solve 2 coding questions matching standard DSA concepts and answer situational judgment scenarios based on Amazon Leadership Principles.

rounds.name: Technical Interview 1 (Problem Solving)
rounds.instructions: Interactive live coding session with a senior engineer. Expect optimization-related questions (e.g., LeetCode Medium/Hard).

rounds.name: Technical Interview 2 (System Design/OOD)
rounds.instructions: Design a scalable system or component. Focus is on classes, interfaces, and solid principles.

rounds.name: Bar Raiser
rounds.instructions: Brace for deep dive behavioral questions testing your culture fit. Interviewed by a neutral third-party 'Bar Raiser'.
